signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Aggressive receivers overpower defenders and attack the football. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on aggressive catches against single coverage.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break hit-stick tackle attempts made on them.
Receivers with this ability have a high success rate when creating separation on the last cut of any route.
Receivers with this ability make sharper cuts and frequently win contested catches when covered by linebackers and linemen.
The most tenacious defenders beat their blocks by sheer force of will. When they enter the zone, their rush move attempts are free.
Defenders with this ability will ignore one bar of blocker resistance when attempting swim/club pass rush moves
Defenders with this ability will repair the fatigue of all defensive linemen on any 3rd or 4th down
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against outside zone plays.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves and apply significant QB pressure while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Avoid stumbling when carrying the ball
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Locker room pep talks go a long way. Players with this ability can easily enter the Zone in the 2nd half.
Blockers with this ability defend against spin pass rush moves as if they had an additional resistance point
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
